response: Start by reading nutrition labels to identify hidden sugars in your [product_name]. Replace sugary drinks with water infused with [fruit_type] for natural flavor. Gradually reduce added sugar in your morning coffee or tea to help your palate adjust. Incorporate more whole foods like vegetables and lean proteins to stay full without cravings. Plan your meals ahead of time to avoid impulsive decisions when hunger strikes. Track your progress in a journal or app to maintain motivation. Remember that consistency is key to long-term success.
